name: feature.drawings.nodes
description: Drawings canvas producer node pack (ADR 0153 Phase 4). The `render` node emits a typed `canvas.drawing` artifact — a constrained vector scene { width?, height?, shapes[] } of typed shapes — that flows through the run-output producer (ADR 0083) and renders inline in the chat artifact workbench as safe inline SVG. Constrained typed JSON, never raw markup; pure transform; replay-safe.
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Render drawing
nodes.description: Emit a `canvas.drawing` artifact. Inputs: { drawing } (or `source` JSON) = { title?, width?, height?, shapes: [{ kind, ...geometry, fill?, stroke?, ... }] }. kind ∈ rect|circle|ellipse|line|polyline|polygon|text. Output: a typed canvas.drawing artifact. Pure transform.
